title: Haiech's Extra Keybinds
description: Adds some keybinds for different minecraft settings for convenience
body:
This mod adds a bunch of keybinds for some settings that I wished were toggleable or changable by a keybind.

here is the list of the added keybinds:

- toggling "toggle sneak"
- toggling "toggle sprint"
- toggling "auto-jump"
- toggling "view bobbing"
- toggling "subtitles"
- toggling "chat visibility"
- incrementing and decrementing "Render Distance" (which was removed in earlier versions of minecraft)
- incrementing and decrementing "Simulation Distance"


if you have any suggestion for what else can be added to this mod, you can contact by email (realhaiech@gmail.com) or by my discord (@realHaiech)
